name: Peppermint Pillow - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Add a touch of whimsy to your home with the Peppermint Pillow from Bullseye's Playground. This round, candy-patterned pillow is crafted from soft polyester, offering a cozy feel. Its multicolored design adds a playful pop to any room, while the sewn seam closure ensures durability. Perfect for indoor use, this novelty plush pillow is a delightful addition to your decor, bringing comfort and charm to your space.
